name: Eastside Be-Bopp Watts Bloods
description: Bopp Watts Bloods Be Bopp Watts Bloods are a predominately Black street organization located in the Watts section of South Los Angeles. They have 2 main clicks or subgroups, the 92nd Street and 93rd Street clicks are are located from 92nd Street (north) to 98th Street (south) along Central Avenue.
